title: Beyond Anxiety
author: Chester Elton
subline: From fear and frustration to curiosity and purpose.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A path through the cover. Starts as a TANGLED red scribble in the upper-center (anxiety), then resolves into a single clean hairline arrow toward the bottom (curiosity/purpose). Title is overlaid on the path. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1320)" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round">
    <!-- Tangled scribble at the top: 12 overlapping red curves, opacity fading -->
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.7">
      <path d="M -300 0 C -200 -80 -100 60 0 -40 C 100 80 200 -60 300 0"/>
      <path d="M -300 30 C -180 -50 -100 90 0 -10 C 100 110 200 -30 300 30"/>
      <path d="M -300 60 C -160 -20 -100 120 0 20 C 100 140 200 0 300 60"/>
      <path d="M -300 90 C -140 10 -100 150 0 50 C 100 170 200 30 300 90"/>
      <path d="M -300 -30 C -220 -110 -100 30 0 -70 C 100 50 200 -90 300 -30"/>
      <path d="M -300 -60 C -240 -140 -100 0 0 -100 C 100 20 200 -120 300 -60"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Then the tangle resolves into a single clean line, descending vertically -->
    <line x1="0" y1="120" x2="0" y2="500" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Arrowhead at the end -->
    <polyline points="-20,470 0,520 20,470" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
    <!-- A whisper label under the arrow -->
    <text x="0" y="580" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.3em">PURPOSE</text>
    <!-- And a label above the tangle -->
    <text x="0" y="-100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.3em">ANXIETY</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The book's metaphor: anxiety is a tangle; beyond it is a clear line of purpose. The top half of the canvas (background, behind the title) shows 6 overlapping red scribble curves — the knotted anxiety. Below the title, a single clean ash hairline descends with an arrowhead, ending in a 'PURPOSE' whisper label. Title sits in the middle (over the transition point), weight 500 command, mixed-case. Brand 'CURIOUS' in the bottom-right; pill '?' at the bottom — the question that breaks the anxiety.
